reelsPage.reelOneTitle: How I build UI faster with Vue + Nuxt
reelsPage.reelOneDescription: A minimal reels frame based on the reference: black background, centered video, vertical actions on the right and up/down navigation at the edge.
reelsPage.reelTwoTitle: Travel reels: a quiet corner to focus
reelsPage.reelTwoDescription: You can connect real data later; for now the UI follows the layout in the reels.png design.
reelsPage.reelThreeDescription: Swipe up or down to switch reels on both mobile and desktop.

productsPage.seoDescription: Explore products, nearby shops and manage listings in the VNSEEA marketplace.
productsPage.title: Marketplace
productsPage.description: Buy and sell products easily on VNSEEA. Explore shops near you, filter by need and track the items getting the most attention.
productsPage.emptyDescription: Try changing your search keyword or widening the distance filter.
productsPage.statActiveStoresDescription: Sellers are updating new products every day.
productsPage.statFeaturedDescription: Recently posted products with good engagement today.
productsPage.statMineDescription: Your personal listings that you can revisit and keep editing.
productsPage.product1Description: Lightweight aluminum frame, disc brakes and full accessories for daily commuting.
productsPage.product2Description: Scratch-resistant top with a minimal shape for a living room or small studio.
productsPage.product3Description: Hair care set with serum, mask and recovery spray after styling.
productsPage.product4Description: Beautiful print, 95% new, suitable for readers who like quick reading and detailed notes.
productsPage.product5Description: Solid bass, 12-hour battery, light water resistance and convenient USB-C charging.
productsPage.product6Description: Even, crunchy and lightly salted. 500g pack for gifts or office snacking.
productsPage.product7Description: Warm light, lightly aged brass base, fits a home workspace.
productsPage.product8Description: Compact body, great portrait results, includes spare battery and shockproof bag.

productEditor.createMediaHelp: Mock UI: press the camera tile to change the number of sample images, up to 10.
productEditor.noOldImages: No old images are being kept.
productEditor.editMediaHelp: Mock UI: old images can be removed from the listing, while new images are simulated as tiles to test the edit flow.

newProductPage.seoDescription: Create a new marketplace product listing in VNSEEA with a simplified field set based on the design.
newProductPage.title: Post a new product
newProductPage.description: The form has been simplified for the marketplace flow: name, price, description, category, condition, location, currency, stock and images.
newProductPage.sectionDescription: The form is aligned to the new design and focuses on the listing's core fields.
newProductPage.submitHint: Mock state: this form only simulates the UI from the design and does not submit yet.
newProductPage.emptyTitle: Your product name will appear here
newProductPage.statImagesDescription: Press the camera tile to change the preview image count.
newProductPage.statCurrencyDescription: The currency currently used for price and right-side preview.
newProductPage.previewDescription: Product description will appear here so you can review it before posting.
newProductPage.checkNamePriceDescription: Fill in product name and price so the card displays completely.
newProductPage.checkDescriptionDescription: Content should be long enough for buyers to understand the product quickly.
newProductPage.checkCategoryDescription: Choose category, condition and currency that match the listing.
newProductPage.checkLocationDescription: Complete area, quantity available and at least one sample image.
newProductPage.tipNameDescription: Name the item clearly so marketplace cards are easier to read and find.
newProductPage.tipPriceDescription: If you use USD in the form, the preview and right-side card sync immediately.
newProductPage.tipImageDescription: The mock uploader simulates camera tiles, but the layout is ready for a multi-image flow.
newProductPage.demoDescription: Lightly used, complete paperwork, smooth engine and still looks new. Suitable for daily commuting or students.

editProductPage.title: Edit product #{id}
editProductPage.description: The edit interface uses the same visual system as product creation, but pre-fills existing data and supports removing current images before saving.
editProductPage.sectionDescription: Data is preloaded by product id so you can edit quickly and save changes.
editProductPage.submitHint: Mock state: the edit product UI has pre-filled old data and old image removal, but does not submit to edit-product.php yet.
editProductPage.previewDescription: Updated description will appear here so you can review it before saving.
editProductPage.statCompletionDescription: Quickly track core fields before saving updates.
editProductPage.statImagesLeftDescription: Old images still kept on the listing after removing unneeded ones.
editProductPage.statStatusDescription: Mock data timestamp loaded for this edit page.
editProductPage.product101Description: Lightly used, complete paperwork, smooth engine and still looks new. Suitable for daily commuting or students.
editProductPage.product202Description: The air fryer set is in good condition, works stably and includes all trays and accessories. Suitable for a small family or apartment.
editProductPage.demoDescription: This is sample data for testing the product edit flow in marketplace.
editProductPage.checkPrefillDescription: Name, price, description and classification are preloaded by product id.
editProductPage.checkMainContentDescription: Fill in product name, price and description so the card displays properly.
editProductPage.checkOldImagesDescription: You can remove existing images before saving changes.
editProductPage.checkReadyDescription: At least one image remains or a new image is added, with enough core data.
editProductPage.tipSmallChanges: Do not change too much at once
editProductPage.tipSmallChangesDescription: If you only update price or stock, keep other fields unchanged to avoid listing drift.
editProductPage.tipRemoveOldDescription: Old images that no longer match product condition should be removed before updating.
editProductPage.tipPreviewDescription: The right-side preview helps ensure edited content still reads well on marketplace cards.

myProductsPage.seoDescription: Manage your marketplace listings and create new products in VNSEEA.
myProductsPage.title: Marketplace
myProductsPage.activeListingsDescription: Listings currently shown publicly in the marketplace.
myProductsPage.draftsDescription: Products saved in progress and not ready to sell yet.
myProductsPage.emptyDescription: When you create a new product, your listings will appear here so you can manage, edit or track engagement.

blogsPage.seoDescription: A list of new articles, trending topics and community posts on VNSEEA.
blogsPage.heroDescription: Follow new stories, community perspectives and topics getting attention on VNSEEA.
blogsPage.filtersDescription: Search by title, author, topic or hashtag and sort your reading feed by need.
blogsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search articles, authors, topics or hashtags
blogsPage.emptyDescription: Change the keyword, choose another topic or turn off the my articles filter.
blogsPage.statTopicsDescription: Categories available in the current content feed.
blogsPage.article1Title: Recycled Plastic Granules Market Growth Accelerates with Global Sustainability Initiatives
blogsPage.article1Excerpt: Recycling businesses are expanding recycled plastic pellet supply chains, focusing on green standards and long-term contracts.
blogsPage.article2Title: Passion Hose: Your Trusted Gas Hose Manufacturer for Industrial and Automotive Needs
blogsPage.article2Excerpt: A look at safety standards, material inspection and how businesses choose gas hose manufacturers.
blogsPage.article3Title: Digital classes after work: how young professionals build skills weekly
blogsPage.article3Excerpt: Short courses, small study groups and open materials help working people keep a steadier learning rhythm.
blogsPage.article4Title: Minimal living spaces for small apartments
blogsPage.article4Excerpt: Lighting, storage and color choices can keep a small apartment tidy while still feeling personal.
blogsPage.article5Title: Tech brief: AI personalizes the news reading feed
blogsPage.article5Excerpt: New recommendation systems prioritize context, preferences and interaction history instead of relying only on views.
blogsPage.article6Excerpt: Easy stops, short itineraries and preparation tips for a lighter trip.
blogsPage.article7Title: Community football teams and how to keep practice consistent
blogsPage.article7Excerpt: Managing fields, assigning roles and tracking fitness helps amateur teams keep a steady match rhythm.
blogsPage.article8Title: Vietnamese indie games and small development teams
blogsPage.article8Excerpt: From weekend prototypes to first releases, small teams are finding ways to tell their own stories.

createBlogPage.seoDescription: Create a new article on VNSEEA with title, content, topic, tags and thumbnail.
createBlogPage.heroDescription: Draft the title, content, topic, hashtags and cover image before publishing to the Blogs feed.
createBlogPage.contentDescription: These fields simulate the create blog UI from audit P-25 and do not call the real API yet.
createBlogPage.tagsHelp: Tags will appear here after input, separated by commas.
createBlogPage.submitHint: Mock state: the form only simulates UI and does not submit yet.
createBlogPage.statReadingDescription: Estimated reading time from current content.
createBlogPage.statTagsDescription: Hashtags help people find the article.
createBlogPage.emptyPreviewExcerpt: The opening excerpt will appear in the preview so you can review reading flow before publishing.
createBlogPage.checkTitleDescription: Use at least 12 characters so the blog card is not empty or too short.
createBlogPage.checkContentDescription: Use at least 80 characters so the reader layout has main content.
createBlogPage.checkTopicTagsDescription: Choose the right category and add at least one hashtag.
createBlogPage.checkThumbnailDescription: A cover image helps the article stand out in the blogs list.
createBlogPage.draftSaved: Mock draft saved. The content remains in the current page state.
createBlogPage.publishComplete: Mock publish complete. When the API is connected, this button will send data to blogs.php.
createBlogPage.publishMissing: Complete the missing checklist items before real publishing.
createBlogPage.demoContent:
When residents participate from the beginning, tree planting, waste sorting and public cleanliness plans are easier to maintain. This article records how a small group divides roles, keeps an update schedule and measures results after each week of work.

## Highlights
- Each group has one person responsible for reminders.
- Results are updated with before and after photos.
- Small activities are repeated consistently instead of being organized too large.
